description: Lock the July 4 industrial batch to Benz prototype component evidence and newspaper/cable-scoped transoceanic news agencies.

checks.reason: The prototype node is anchored to Benz's January 29, 1886 gas-engine vehicle patent.
Rubber tire and belt materials remain enabling component capabilities for Benz-style prototypes.
Rubber components support practical road operation but are not the date-defining invention.
Bicycle-derived lightweight wheel and drive practice remains the local rationale for this broader prerequisite.
Bicycle practice is an enabling design influence, not a required precursor for all automobile development.
The node is anchored to cable-enabled transoceanic agency operation after commercially viable Atlantic cable service.
Newspapers remain the source-backed subscriber and distribution market for early wire agencies.
Newspapers enabled the agency market but were not a single required technical component.
Transoceanic cable networks remain the differentiating communication infrastructure.
Stock ticker terminals should not return as a prerequisite for newspaper-facing news agencies.
